name: loom
description: One request becomes a scoped, evidence-backed plan that earns the right to execute.

interface.longDescription: Turn any request into a scoped, evidence-backed execution plan with lifecycle gates, bounded owner learning, and local-first privacy.
defaultPrompt: /loom Plan this request safely and completely.
/loom Move my Loom to this device.
/loom Show what you learned from this project.
